allow: PowerShell(if \($env:OPENAI_API_KEY\) { "OPENAI_API_KEY is set" } else { "OPENAI_API_KEY is NOT set" })

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 5096 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; cd "c:\\Users\\abhis\\OneDrive\\Documents\\GitHub\\chatbot"; Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m", "uvicorn", "main:app", "--host", "127.0.0.1", "--port", "8001" -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\chatbot_out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\chatbot_err.txt" -PassThru | Select-Object Id)

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== POST /chat \(missing field — should 422\) ==="; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8001/chat" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{}' -UseBasicParsing } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; $_.ErrorDetails.Message })
